latest.title: Built on Bedrock · SF May 12th
latest.description: Built on Bedrock Demo Night in May

latest.title: The only Kiro configurations you need for your first project
latest.description: The difference between "Kiro wrote some code" and "Kiro built exactly what I wanted" comes down to how you set it up. This guide walks you through the configurations that matter most for your first project: agent skills, spec-driven development, steering files, and MCP servers. You'll configure each one and build a portfolio site in the process. Every setup here carries forward to your next project.

latest.title: De Calouro à Líder Estudantil Builder AWS: Minha Jornada na Nuvem e AWS Builder Center
latest.description: Quando cheguei a Limeira para cursar Sistemas de Informação na Unicamp, minha bagagem cabia em algumas caixas dentro de uma kitnet recém-alugada. Eu trazia comigo o diploma de técnico do IFSP e uma série de experiências que eu chamava de "meus pontos" (dots): projetos inacabados, participações em feiras e horas de código em linguagens diferentes.

latest.title: Top 3 recursos interessantes da AWS para estudantes de tecnologia
latest.description: Amazon EC2, Amazon S3 e AWS IAM estão entre os principais serviços da AWS. Juntos, eles ensinam fundamentos de servidores, armazenamento em nuvem e segurança, áreas essenciais para quem deseja crescer na tecnologia.

latest.title: Financial Document Processing Automation with Amazon Quick Automate
latest.description: Learn how to build an end-to-end financial document processing pipeline using Amazon Quick Automate. This step-by-step guide walks through a 6-step workflow that automates document retrieval from investor relations websites, AI-powered data extraction, financial analysis with KPI calculations, and report distribution — all with no custom code required.

latest.title: Unlocking the true potential of Route 53 Global Resolver
latest.description: This article explores a few real life use cases of how AWS customers can leverage Route 53 Global Resolver.

latest.title: I Built an AI Bracket Predictor on AWS. Here's How It Performed Against the Real Tournament.
latest.description: My AWS-powered bracket predictor picked Duke to win it all. Michigan had other plans. Here's what the model got right, what it missed, and what I learned.

latest.title: Stop Paying Too Much for CloudWatch Logs — Auto-Archive to S3 via Firehose
latest.description: Keeping logs in CloudWatch Logs long-term costs over $1,000 for 18 months. Learn how the Subscription → Firehose → S3 (Deep Archive) architecture cuts that cost by ~85% with fully automated operations.

latest.title: The Architecture of Trust: Building Secure-by-Design AI Agents
latest.description: A Guide to the New Frontier of Agentic Security and Autonomous Development

latest.title: Who Spent the Tokens? Rethinking Bedrock Cost Governance with IAM Principal-Based Cost Allocation
latest.description: When enterprises can finally attribute generative AI costs to caller identity, what gets restructured isn't just the reports — it's platform governance itself.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.

trending.title: Top 3 recursos interessantes da AWS para estudantes de tecnologia
trending.description: Amazon EC2, Amazon S3 e AWS IAM estão entre os principais serviços da AWS. Juntos, eles ensinam fundamentos de servidores, armazenamento em nuvem e segurança, áreas essenciais para quem deseja crescer na tecnologia.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Perspective
trending.description: Perspective is an AI-powered mental health companion that extracts clinical insight from free-form speech — no mood scales required. Using 4-cluster parallel extraction on Amazon Bedrock, validated against the Subjective Units of Distress Scale (SUDS), Work and Social Adjustment Scale (WSAS), PHQ-9, and GAD-7, it serves undiagnosed users and diagnosed patients alike. Clinician-validated by three practising doctors. Built on AWS serverless with Kiro.

trending.title: Construye con Strands Agents en Nerdearla Chile 2026
trending.description: Crea tu primer proyecto con Strands Agents en Nerdearla del 17 y 18 de Abril 2026 en Centro GAM, Santiago, Chile.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: NeuroVoice
trending.description: Small moments, repeated daily, reveal what single snapshots never can - patterns that quietly signal neurological risk. NeuroVoice is a multimodal Parkinson’s screening platform that tracks pattern over time to detect subtle neurological changes early.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Veloquity - The Agentic Evidence Intelligent Platform Turning Raw Feedback into Evidence-Driven Decisions
trending.description: Decisions don’t fail from too little data - they fail from too much noise. Veloquity, an agentic evidence intelligence platform, filters that noise by transforming fragmented feedback into validated evidence and delivering explainable, prioritized recommendations with full source-to-decision traceability that guides human decisions. READ ON TO SEE HOW.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: CareLens AI — Transparent Care Guidance When It Matters Most.
trending.description: CareLens is a privacy-first AI platform that helps people understand healthcare costs before seeking treatment. By analyzing de-identified symptoms, location, and optional insurance details, it compares care options like ER, urgent care, or specialists and surfaces real-world price ranges using hospital transparency and CMS data. It doesn’t diagnose—it delivers clear, grounded cost, bill analyzing and care guidance so users can make confident decisions without surprise bills.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: RetainIQ
trending.description: Detect knowledge concentration risk before it costs you. RetainIQ scores every critical topic 0–100 and triggers AI interventions. Zero docs effort required.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Aether Health
trending.description: Discover how our AI-powered platform reimagines the last mile of healthcare by focusing on empathetic symptom checking and prescription decoding. We provide verified, calming tools to combat health anxiety and prevent dangerous medication errors for vulnerable populations.
